series_metadata.series_description: Maintenance contracts for data processing equipment, and related records including copies of contracts, service histories, and work orders.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: For sale of goods, retain five years after contract expires, then destroy. For services, retain 16 years, then destroy. ; Electronic: For sale of goods, retain five years after contract expires, then destroy. For services, retain 16 years, then destroy., Paper: Recycle ; Electronic: Delete
